Hey everybody, in this video I want to show you how you can get a copy of the Leads and Stats Google Sheet that we provide to you that you can use to get all of your Leads in a central place. This Google Sheet is a great reference and resource because it means that we're able to connect different automated systems to it and you don't have to manually put in everybody who ends up opting into your ClickFunnels or scheduling an appointment onto it. With Zapier it'll connect it between everything and get all of your Leads in here once. Below this video we're going to include a button. When you click on that button it's going to take you to a page that allows you to make a copy of that sheet. Once you see that blue make a copy button go ahead and click on that and it's going to duplicate the sheet and put it on your own Google Drive. That way you have your own version of it that you can make changes to. Up at the top left you're able to change the name of the sheet. You can click in here. I always like to delete the copy of. You can name it whatever you want to. It's not bad to give it a date of an idea of when you started it. That way if you end up with more than one sheet you're able to tell which one is from what month. The sheet that we provide has three different tabs on it. We'll go into more depth on how to use it later on. But this way you already have that sheet on your own Google Drive and you can start going from here. Once you have your own copy you're good to go. I hope you enjoyed this video and hope you have a great rest of your day.
